title: buildah bud --force-rm functionality is missing
body:
**Description**
`buildah bud --force-rm` is missing and needs to be provided.  This is functionality that Docker has.

#599 is the parent issue for this issue.

**Output of `buildah version`:**

Buildah v0.16

comments.body: Since we don't have caching this one can not be implemented yet.
With PR #639 implementing noop for `--rm`, the same can probably be done for this flag until caching is implemented in #601.
